query: Lee Jae-myung approval rating Gallup Korea Realmeter late June early July 2026, is approval still falling, what is driving the decline, any dead cross
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary of findings on Lee Jae-myung's approval ratings for late June/early July 2026:

## Key Findings

**Was approval still falling?** It fell through most of June but **rebounded modestly in the first week of July** on both major polls, ending the multi-week slide.

**Dead cross? — Two pollsters diverge:**

| Pollster | Dead cross? | Latest reading |
|----------|-------------|----------------|
| **Gallup Korea** | **No** — approval stayed above disapproval | Bottomed at 51%/41% (Jun 24–26), rebounded to **54%/36%** (Jun 30–Jul 2) |
| **Realmeter** | **Yes** — first since inauguration on Jun 22; sustained 3 weeks | 46.7%/49.7% → 46.5%/49.5% → **47.0%/49.2%** (Jun 29–Jul 3) |

- **Gallup** fell from a May peak of 64% (March high ~67%) for two weeks, then rebounded.
- **Realmeter** declined for **6 consecutive weeks**, crossed into dead cross Jun 22, and stayed there through early July even after a +0.5pp uptick.
- A third pollster, **KSOI** (Jul 6–7), showed 54.7%/40.9% — "escaping the dead cross."

**What's driving the decline** (consistent across pollsters):
1. **June 3 local-election / National Election Commission (NEC) irregularities controversy** — the top trigger
2. **Democratic Party internal factional infighting** and policy drift
3. **Economic concerns** — weak won/high FX rate, housing policy, stock-market volatility
4. **"Excessive" welfare/spending** concerns (earlier factor)

The early-July rebound was linked to Lee's economic "three mega-projects" agenda, EU/Europe summit outcomes, and the KOSPI briefly breaking 9,000.

*Note: AskNews tools were unavailable (credit limits), so I relied on web search and direct article fetches from Korea Herald, Korea Times, UPI, Seoul Economic Daily, Newspim, and Korean-language outlets.*

sources.title: Lee's approval rating sinks to lowest point since taking office: Gallup poll
sources.snippet: Approval dropped to 51 percent, lowest since he took office; disapproval 41%. Reasons: economy, housing policies, NEC irregularities.

sources.title: Lee's approval rating rebounds to 54% after dipping to lowest level
sources.snippet: Gallup Korea Jun 30–Jul 2, 1,005 people: 54% approved, up 3pp from a week earlier.

sources.title: President Lee Jae Myung's approval rating recovers slightly to 54%… impact of 'three mega projects' [Korea Gallup]
sources.snippet: Job approval 54%, slight increase; recovered after economic mega-projects announcement.

sources.snippet: Gallup Jun 30–Jul 2, 1,005 voters: 54% positive, 36% negative; DP 41%, PPP 26% (-1pp).

sources.title: Lee's Approval Hits First "Dead Cross" Since Inauguration
sources.snippet: Lee's job approval recorded its first dead cross since inauguration.

sources.title: President Lee Jae Myung's disapproval exceeds approval for first time
sources.snippet: Realmeter: 46.7% approved (down 4.8pp), 49.7% disapproved (up 5.5pp); drivers election-management failures and ruling-party infighting.

sources.title: South Korean president's approval falls for sixth week
sources.snippet: Realmeter: approval fell to 46.5% for a sixth consecutive week; disapproval 49.5%.

sources.title: 李대통령 지지율 47.0%…7주만에 소폭 반등 [리얼미터]
sources.snippet: Realmeter Jun 29–Jul 3, 2,525 voters: approval 47.0%, disapproval 49.2%; DP 43.0%, PPP 40.3%; stock plunge and high FX cited.

sources.title: 이 대통령 국정지지율 47%…7주 만에 반등에도 '데드크로스' 지속 [리얼미터]
sources.snippet: Realmeter: approval rebounded after 7 weeks but dead cross continued for a 3rd straight week; DP 43.0% vs PPP 40.3%.

sources.title: Lee's approval rating in negative territory for 1st time
sources.snippet: Fifth consecutive weekly decline; negative views exceeded positive for first time (Realmeter).

sources.title: 이재명 대통령 지지율 57%…민주당 41%·국민의힘 29% [한국갤럽]
sources.snippet: Gallup mid-June: 57% approve (down 7pp over three weeks), 33% disapprove; cited June 3 election/NEC controversy and high FX.

sources.title: 李대통령 지지율 7%p 상승한 54.7%... 데드크로스 탈출 (KSOI)
sources.snippet: KSOI Jul 6–7, 1,002 voters: approval 54.7%, disapproval 40.9%; escaped dead cross; top approval reason economic recovery 27.7%.

sources.title: Lee's approval rating drops for fourth straight week while PPP reaches highest level: Poll
sources.snippet: Approval fell for fourth consecutive week to 51.5%; PPP rose to 44.3%, overtaking DP.
